Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\lonew\\Documents\\enterprise\\Device-manage\\Backend" && python manage.py shell -c "
import os; os.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE'] = 'printer.settings'
from rest_framework.test import APIRequestFactory
from rest_framework.authtoken.models import Token
from devices.views import ConsumableViewSet

factory = APIRequestFactory\(\)
request = factory.get\('/api/devices/consumables/'\)
token = Token.objects.first\(\)
print\('Token:', token\)
request.META['HTTP_AUTHORIZATION'] = f'Token {token.key}'

from rest_framework.authtoken.authentication import TokenAuthentication
auth = TokenAuthentication\(\)
user, tok = auth.authenticate\(request\)
request.user = user

view = ConsumableViewSet.as_view\({'get': 'list'}\)
response = view\(request\)
print\('Status:', response.status_code\)
print\('Data count:', response.data.get\('count'\)\)
print\('Results len:', len\(response.data.get\('results', []\)\)\)
" 2>&1)
